data.name: Hentai World Bikini
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the Hentai World Bikini ! Are you prepared to test your focus and determination? In this game, you'll dive into a vibrant yet straightforward environment, where your goal is to locate and match pairs of identical images. With an arcade-style approach, you'll experience countless hours of fun while pushing your limits in the game.

Feature list :

Arcade style matching game.

Relaxing audio track.

Fullview mode after completing game.

Get ready for exciting and engaging experiences. Don't worry about time or scores, just enjoy the fun moments and immerse yourself in the colorful world of Hentai World Bikini!

data.short_description: This is a relaxing game with multiple sexy girls. This is a challenge of matching images, featuring a calm and straightforward arcade design .
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:

  • Memory: 4 MB RAM
  • Graphics: 1 GB
